zh.St Winifred's Church, Branscombe, Devon,: 英國戴文布藍斯可姆聖 文尼福雷達斯 邱奇
zh.lifeSummary: 當Joan Tregarthen於大約1492年出生在英國時，她的父親John Tregarthen15歲，母親Johanna Trethurffe14歲。她於1494年與Sir John Wadham o f Merrifield Somerset  Esq.在英國英格蘭可瓦爾結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。她去世於1583年9月30日在英國戴文布藍斯可姆享年92歲，埋葬在英國戴文布藍斯可姆聖 文尼福雷達斯 邱奇。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Joan Tregarthen于大约1492年出生在英国时，她的父亲John Tregarthen15岁，母亲Johanna Trethurffe14岁。她于1494年与Sir John Wadham o f Merrifield Somerset  Esq.在英国英格兰可瓦爾结婚。他们至少是1个女儿的父母。她去世于1583年9月30日在英国戴文布藍斯可姆享年92岁，埋葬在英国戴文布藍斯可姆聖 文尼福雷達斯 邱奇。

nameMeanings.name: Tregarthen
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Cornish: habitational name from Trevarthian (either Newlyn East or Saint Hilary, Cornwall). Both placenames derive from Middle Cornish tref ‘estate, farmstead’ + a personal name related to Old Welsh Arthgen (Middle Welsh Arthen).

nameMeanings.name: Joan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Contracted form of Old French Jo(h)anne, from Latin Io(h)anna ( see Joanna ). In England this was the usual feminine form of John from the Middle English period onwards and was extremely popular, but in the 16th and 17th centuries it steadily lost ground to Jane . It was strongly revived in the first part of the 20th century, partly under the influence of George Bernard Shaw's play St Joan ( 1923 ), based on the life of Joan of Arc ( 1412–31 ). Claiming to be guided by the voices of the saints, she persuaded the French dauphin to defy the occupying English forces and have himself crowned, and she led the French army that raised the siege of Orleans in 1429 . The following year she was captured by the Burgundians and sold to the English, and a year later she was burned at the stake for witchcraft at the age of 18 or 19. Her story has captured the imagination of many writers, and she is variously portrayed as a national and political hero, a model of apolitical straightforwardness and honesty, and a religious heroine. She was canonized in 1920 . More recent influences have included the American film actress Joan Crawford ( 1908–77 , born Lucille le Sueur ), the British actress Joan Collins ( b. 1933 ), the American comedienne Joan Rivers ( b. 1933 ), and the West Indian pop singer Joan Armatrading ( b. 1950 ).

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

en.lifeSummary: When Joan Tregarthen was born about 1492, in England, her father, John Tregarthen, was 15 and her mother, Johanna Trethurffe, was 14. She married Sir John Wadham o f Merrifield Somerset  Esq. in 1494, in Cornwall, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter. She died on 30 September 1583, in Branscombe, Devon, England, at the age of 92, and was buried in St Winifred's Church, Branscombe, Devon, England.

fr.St Winifred's Church, Branscombe, Devon,: St Winifred's Church, Branscombe, Devon, Angleterre
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Joan Tregarthen est née environ 1492, à Angleterre, son père, John Tregarthen, avait 15 ans et sa mère, Johanna Trethurffe, avait 14 ans. Elle a épousé Sir John Wadham o f Merrifield Somerset  Esq. en 1494, à Cornouailles, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fille. Elle est décédée le 30 septembre 1583, à Branscombe, Devon, Angleterre, à l’âge de 92 ans, et a été enterrée à St Winifred's Church, Branscombe, Devon, Angleterre.

de.St Winifred's Church, Branscombe, Devon,: St Winifred's Church, Branscombe, Devon, England
de.lifeSummary: Als Joan Tregarthen um 1492 in England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater John Tregarthen 15 und ihre Mutter Johanna Trethurffe 14. Sie hat 1494 in Cornwall, England, United Kingdom Sir John Wadham o f Merrifield Somerset  Esq. geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Tochter. Sie starb am 30. September 1583 im Alter von 92 Jahren in Branscombe, Devon, England und wurde in St Winifred's Church, Branscombe, Devon, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Joan Tregarthen è nata il circa 1492 nel England, sua padre, John Tregarthen, aveva 15 anni e sua madre, Johanna Trethurffe, aveva 14 anni. Lei sposato Sir John Wadham o f Merrifield Somerset  Esq. nel 1494, nel Cornwall, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlia. Morì il 30 settembre 1583, nel Branscombe, Devon, England, all'età di 92 anni, e fu sepolta a St Winifred's Church, Branscombe, Devon, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Joan Tregarthenが約1492年にイギリスで生まれた時，父John Tregarthenは15歳，母Johanna Trethurffeは14歳であった。1494年にイギリスイギリスコルンワルでSir John Wadham o f Merrifield Somerset  Esq.と結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1583年9月30日にイギリスデボンブランスコンベで92歳で死去し，イギリスデボンブランスコンベスト ウィニフレド'ス チャーチにて埋葬された。

ko.St Winifred's Church, Branscombe, Devon,: 영국 데폰 브랜스코브 스트 윈이프레드'스 c후르치
ko.lifeSummary: Joan Tregarthen(이)가 대략 1492년 영국에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John Tregarthen(은)는 15세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Johanna Trethurffe(은)는 14세였다. 그녀는 1494년 영국 잉글랜드 코른월에서 Sir John Wadham o f Merrifield Somerset  Esq.(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1583년 9월 30일 영국 데폰 브랜스코브에서 92세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 데폰 브랜스코브 스트 윈이프레드'스 c후르치에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Joan Tregarthen nasceu aproximadamente 1492, em Inglaterra, seu pai, John Tregarthen, tinha 15 anos e sua mãe, Johanna Trethurffe, tinha 14 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir John Wadham o f Merrifield Somerset  Esq. em 1494, em Cornwall, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 30 de setembro de 1583, em Branscombe, Devon, Inglaterra, com 92 anos, e foi sepultada em St Winifred's Church, Branscombe, Devon, Inglaterra.

ru.St Winifred's Church, Branscombe, Devon,: ст винифред'с чурч, бранскомб, девон, Англия
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Joan Tregarthen родилась около 1492 г. в местности Англия, её отцу по имени John Tregarthen было 15 лет, а матери, которую звали Johanna Trethurffe, 14. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir John Wadham o f Merrifield Somerset  Esq. в 1494 г. в местности корнвалл, Англия, Великобритания. У них была по крайней мере 1 дочь. Она умерла 30 сентября 1583 г. в местности бранскомб, девон, Англия в возрасте 92 лет и была похоронена в местности ст винифред'с чурч, бранскомб, девон, Англия.
